steps.title: Identify the context of the activity
steps.content: Gogol is at a beach where he “collects rocks, digs tunnels in the sand.” The paired verbs both describe active, hands-on play, establishing what “collects” means in this scene.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The word “collects” means to gather or pick up rocks. Choice D “Gathers” directly names this action. The other choices do not fit the activity of picking up beach rocks. That confirms D is correct.
